name: retry-policy
description: Defines retry behaviour for transient failures across all layers — API calls, extraction engines, build commands, and deployment steps.

apiCalls.description: Retry policy for external API calls (Vercel, GitHub, Cloudflare, Firecrawl)

extractionEngines.description: Retry policy for website extraction operations
extractionEngines.note: On failure, try next engine in fallback chain before retrying same engine

buildCommands.note: First failure triggers auto-repair, second failure is terminal for the build

deploymentSteps.description: Retry policy for deployment workflow steps
deploymentSteps.note: Deployment polling (e.g., waiting for Vercel READY state)

dnsPropagation.description: Retry policy for DNS propagation verification

httpVerification.description: Retry policy for HTTPS and homepage verification
